exports.name: mountInGameView
exports.signature: (container: HTMLElement, gameId: string) -> { unmount: () -> void }; mounts the in-game UI for the given gameId; returns an unmount handle

exports.name: mountWrapUpView
exports.signature: (container: HTMLElement, gameId: string) -> { unmount: () -> void }; mounts the end-of-game wrap-up screen

invariants: Section-6's router decides which view to mount based on the GameDocument's status (read via section-2). Section-4 does not own routing.
